scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @afterglow/server" "npm run dev -w @afterglow/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @afterglow/shared && npm run build -w @afterglow/server && npm run build -w @afterglow/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w @afterglow/server && npm run test -w @afterglow/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @afterglow/shared && npm run typecheck -w @afterglow/server && npm run typecheck -w @afterglow/client
